summary: Standalone evaluation engine and bundled skill for bounded behavior review beyond repo-local deterministic gates.

repo_followup.summary: Materialize the upstream host-repo cautilus consumer surface when you want the repo-local `.agents/skills/cautilus/` entrypoint in addition to charness-managed synced support discovery.

notes: Install from a tagged GitHub release with the upstream install script or keep a checked-out upstream repo with its runtime dependencies installed.
Consumer repos keep `cautilus-adapter.yaml` and named adapters locally; `charness` only points at the product boundary.
Update through the same release or checkout path that originally installed `cautilus`.

detect.failure_hint: Install the standalone `cautilus` binary or keep the upstream checkout on PATH.

healthcheck.failure_hint: The binary exists but its repo-consumer surface is unavailable. Reinstall from a clean upstream release or refresh the upstream checkout.

version_expectation.constraint: Prefer a recent upstream-supported release or checkout aligned with the checked-in consumer contract.

notes: Prefer the upstream bundled skill instead of copying evaluator workflow guidance into `charness`.

when_missing: Keep deterministic local gates authoritative and report evaluator-backed validation as unavailable.
Do not claim deeper workflow or behavior review succeeded without the standalone evaluator.
when_version_mismatch: Treat compare, normalize, or review-surface drift as a manual investigation point before trusting evaluator output.

host_notes: The repo-local root `cautilus-adapter.yaml` stays the consumer-owned entrypoint.
Richer named evaluator adapters remain consumer-owned even when `charness` tracks the upstream product boundary.
